description_long: This kiosk features a modern, minimalist design with a U-shaped structure constructed from vertically paneled, light-colored wood. The front and rear openings are wide and arching, providing easy access and visibility into the interior. The side panels are solid, with one side displaying a decorative logo and the word 'Atelier' surrounded by a leaf motif. The interior back wall is adorned with a large photographic mural, adding visual interest and branding. The floor is a contrasting dark surface, likely made of a durable material suitable for high foot traffic. The overall appearance is sleek and inviting, ideal for use as a retail or information booth in urban environments.
description: A modern, U-shaped wooden kiosk with arching entrances, decorative branding, and a photographic mural on the interior back wall. The design is sleek, minimalist, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: The kiosk is seen from an angle showing the open front and interior mural, with the arching wooden structure framing the entrance.
description_view_1: This view highlights the solid side panel with the 'Atelier' logo and leaf motif, emphasizing the branding and closed nature of the side.
description_view_2: Similar to view 1, this angle shows the opposite side panel with the same logo, reinforcing the symmetrical branding.
description_view_3: The rear opening and interior mural are visible, with the arching structure framing the back entrance and the dark floor contrasting with the light wood.
attribute_signage_type: Printed logo and decorative motif on side panels; large photographic mural on interior back wall; visible text: 'Atelier'.
attribute_door_configuration: Open archway entrances at front and rear; no doors present.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with rounded corners, constructed from vertically paneled wood; no overhangs or skylights.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with rustic wood paneling and clean, arching lines.
